sensitivity.note: Defense/ME employers: keep real names. Generic corporate: use sanitized versions. Always ask user.

jd.title: Director of Strategy — Defense & Aerospace Programs

requirements.text: 15+ years in defense or aerospace industry with progressive leadership
Experience with international defense cooperation programs
Track record in defense export strategy and market development
Knowledge of fighter aircraft or advanced weapons programs
Experience building partnerships between defense OEMs and national air forces
Understanding of defense procurement cycles and offset programs
MS or higher in Engineering, MBA, or related field
Experience with technology transfer and indigenous capability development
Executive-level stakeholder management across government and industry

responsibilities: Develop defense program strategy for fighter aircraft and advanced systems portfolio
Lead business development for international defense cooperation programs
Build and maintain strategic partnerships with OEMs, air forces, and defense ministries
Assess technology transfer opportunities and indigenous capability development
Coordinate with senior military and government stakeholders
Present strategic recommendations to executive leadership

expected_output.summary: Defense strategy and programs leader with 16+ years in Pakistan Air Force spanning JF-17 Thunder joint development (China), SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet programs (Sweden), and indigenous capability building at PAC Kamra. Unique combination of hands-on systems engineering, senior PMO leadership, international technology transfer experience, and export program coordination across 11+ countries. Bridges technical depth with strategic program vision.

experience.title: Deputy Director, Program Management Office — JF-17 Aircraft
bullets: Led strategic oversight of JF-17 Thunder program including production, modification, and export coordination
Managed export variant coordination for international customers (Myanmar, Nigeria, and 9+ prospect nations)
Directed engineering change management and technology evolution roadmap for Block III development
Represented PAF in program reviews with CADI and international stakeholders

experience.title: Aerospace Systems Integration Lead
bullets: Led Pakistan's engineering team at CADI for JF-17 Block III development — key technology transfer program
Managed indigenous capability development: mission computer, EW suite replacing legacy foreign components
Bridged cross-cultural partnership between PAF and Chinese aerospace industry
Supported strategic decisions on make-vs-buy for avionics subsystems

experience.title: PMO Officer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet sustainment strategy and vendor relationships with SAAB (Sweden)
Coordinated obsolescence management and system upgrade programs for 9-aircraft fleet

experience.title: Assistant Director, Program Management Office — JF-17 Aircraft
bullets: Coordinated program strategy between CADI (OEM), PAC Kamra (manufacturing), and operational squadrons
Managed configuration and technology baseline decisions for indigenous systems integration

experience.title: Integrated Systems & Design Specialist
bullets: Built foundational aerospace engineering expertise through hands-on avionics integration
Contributed to indigenous manufacturing capability for military aircraft platforms

certifications: Engineering Project Management Specialization — Rice University
education: BE Avionics Engineering — College of Aeronautical Engineering, PAF (2004-2008)

jd_requirements: partnerships defense OEMs national air forces

provenance.notes: Real user career data. JDs modeled from real defense/aerospace postings. User snap-checked during creation session. Expected outputs derived from verified ground truth profile.
